iree_add_all_subdirs()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV AND LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_VULKAN)
set(_vulkan_platform_deps "")
if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV AND LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_VULKAN)
  list(APPEND _vulkan_platform_deps iree::third_party::vulkan_headers)
endif()
loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    vulkan
  HDRS
    "${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/loom/binding/c/include/loomc/target/spirv/vulkan.h"

    "vulkan.c"
  DEPS
    iree::base::internal
    loom::binding::c::loomc
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv
    ${_vulkan_platform_deps}
  ALWAYSLINK
  PUBLIC
)
endif()
